## Testing

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how to reproduce them -->

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`composer test`)
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Code coverage remains at 100% (`composer test:coverage`)
- [ ] PHPStan analysis passes (`composer analyse`)
- [ ] Code formatted with Pint (`composer format`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have added/updated PHPDoc comments
- [ ] I have updated the README if needed
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have added both static and fluent methods (if adding new functionality)
- [ ] I have avoided unnecessary array conversions for performance
